name: x402-conformance-mcp
description: MCP server with x402 conformance + compliance tools: decode a 402 PaymentRequired, inspect a PAYMENT-RESPONSE (with on-chain net-balance truth check), lint a scheme spec, validate an extension payload, statically check code for spec-compliance, and run the verify/settle/idempotency conformance flow against a facilitator. Holds no keys — non-custodial by design.
